retry_reason: kref_init always succeeds unconditionally; no failure path exists, so retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: Set-wrapper for a cache key object: initializes the embedded kref to 1 (establishing an initial reference). Also assigns the parent cache_tree and initializes the list and rb_node fields for insertion into data structures. Caller must pair this init with exactly one kref_put when the key is no longer needed to release the reference. This function is the 'birth' of the key's lifecycle.
